title: hedraiostylus corniculatus
intro: Hedraiostylus corniculatus, also known as the 'horned grass', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Hedraiostylus corniculatus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat digestive issues. Hedraiostylus corniculatus is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
